description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and featuring a flat roof. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a front patio with outdoor seating, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a spacious wooden deck with lounge chairs, a swimming pool, and a separate pool house or cabana. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements. The materials used appear to be concrete, glass, wood, and metal, contributing to a sleek and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, landscaped garden, pool, and wooden deck, all enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, front patio, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the rear pool area with deck and pool house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, pool house, and dense greenery along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the front entrance, garden, and hedge boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
